title: Vandolay

{{Quote|Alert all commands. Ready the tractor beam.|Admiral Firmus Piett's orders to his command crew, including Vandolay|<ref name="ESB" />}}
'''Vandolay''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] attaché aboard the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. By [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Vandolay held the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Corporal/Legends|corporal]] and was the [[Political Liaison]] for the [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|Commission for the Preservation of the New Order]], as well as the [[Detention Officer]] responsible for all [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] transfers aboard the ''Executor''. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], Vandolay was present aboard the ''Executor'' during the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Occupation of Bespin|occupation]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]].

==Biography==
[[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] Vandolay was a [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="CCG" /> who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]],<ref name="ESB" /> serving aboard<ref name="CCG" /> the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]]<ref name="ssd-db">{{DB|starship|superstardestroyer|Super Star Destroyer}}</ref> [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']],<ref name="CCG" /> by the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']] to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].</ref> Aboard the ''Executor'', Vandolay was the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] attaché and [[Political Liaison]] for the [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|Commission for the Preservation of the New Order]],<ref name="CCG" /> an organization that supported [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[New Order/Legends|New Order]] by ensuring the cultural edification of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] citizens.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|136|COMPNOR (COMPOR)}}</ref> Vandolay was also the ''Executor''{{'s}} [[Detention Officer]] and was responsible for all [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] transfers aboard the [[Warship/Legends|warship]].<ref name="CCG" />

In 3 ABY,<ref name="NEC" /> Vandolay was present in one of the crewpits of the ''Executor''{{'s}} [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|command bridge]] during the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer's]] attempt to capture the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]—carrying the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] fugitives [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]—following the [[Starship/Legends|vessel's]] escape from [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] on the Imperial-[[Occupation of Bespin|occupied]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. Vandolay and the other crew members responded to [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Firmus Piett/Legends|Firmus Piett's]] order to ready the [[Battleship/Legends|battleship's]] [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] to capture the ''Millennium Falcon''. However, at the last [[Standard minute/Legends|minute]], the ''Millennium Falcon'' suddenly escaped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].<ref name="ESB" />

==Personality and traits==
Vandolay had [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]]<ref name="CCG" /> and fair skin.<ref name="ESB" /> Vandolay was a fierce supporter of the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor's]] New Order.<ref name="CCG" />

==Equipment==
While serving aboard the ''Executor'', Vandolay wore a black [[Imperial Navy crewman]] [[Imperial military uniforms/Legends|uniform]].<ref name="ESB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Albeit initially unnamed, Vandolay first appeared in the [[1980]] film [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']]. The actor portraying Vandolay first appeared as a member of the bridge crew of the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Avenger/Legends|''Avenger'']] during the pursuit of the ''Millennium Falcon'' in the [[Anoat system/Legends|Anoat system]]. That character, however, is not [[canon]]ically established to be Vandolay. Toward the end of the film, the actor appears again in reused footage from the ''Avenger'' scene during the ''Executor''{{'s}} attempted capture of the ''Millennium Falcon'' over Bespin. Only the back of the character's head is visible on-screen during this scene, however.<ref name="ESB" />

The Vandolay character was later given a name and brief backstory on the [http://www.starwarsccg.org/cardlists/images/starwars/Dagobah-Dark/large/corporalvandolay.gif "Corporal Vandolay" card] for the [[1997]] ''[[Dagobah Limited]]'' expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]], which canonically established Vandolay as the character appearing in the reused-footage ''Executor'' scene. Notably, however, the card used a still of the character from the ''Avenger''{{'s}} bridge scene as the canonical image of Vandolay.<ref name="CCG" />
